title: diarthron iranicum subsp. iranicum
intro: Diarthron iranicum subsp. iranicum is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the Iranian borago or Iranian borage. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its high content of antioxidants and essential fatty acids. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, wounds, and skin irritations. Diarthron iranicum subsp. iranicum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
